_comment: Shape of a Gmail Trigger output item (n8n-nodes-base.gmailTrigger), trimmed to the fields Extract Email Fields reads. Use as pinData on the Gmail Trigger node in the real workflow.json to test the real node wiring offline, without a live Gmail credential.
subject: Refund never processed, this is urgent
text: I was charged twice last week and still have no refund. This is extremely frustrating and I need this fixed today.
